message:
fix(caam): resolve TypeScript errors in CAAM implementation

- Fix imports: use db from ../db instead of getDb from ../db/connection
- Fix audit calls: use audit() with correct action/resourceType names
- Add CAAM-specific audit actions (profile.create, profile.update, etc.)
- Add CAAM resource types (account_profile, account_pool)
- Fix exactOptionalPropertyTypes issues by conditionally including optional fields
- Fix implicit any types in getPoolProfiles map/filter callbacks
- Fix deleteProfile to check existence instead of using rowsAffected
- Add override modifiers to ErrorBoundary class methods
- Use bracket notation for index signature properties in ErrorBoundary
- Fix subscribe return type in Toaster to return () => void

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
